feedback.markdownBody:
VERIFICATION STUCK for PAN-2150 (attempt 3/3):

Failed check: vbrief-ac

Acceptance criteria check FAILED — 22/22 AC incomplete:

### WI-1: Extract module-level interfaces, constants, voice helpers, and buildMiniMaxFormData into co-located modules (3/3 incomplete)
  - [ ] Given the moved interfaces/constants/helpers, when npm run typecheck runs, then SettingsPage.tsx compiles importing them from the new modules with no type errors.
  - [ ] Given the test file unchanged, when npx vitest run src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/Settings/__tests__/SettingsPage.test.ts runs, then buildMiniMaxFormData still imports from '../SettingsPage' and all its cases pass.
  - [ ] Given settingsPageConstants.ts now holds TRACKERS (icon: any), when npm run lint runs, then the any-ratchet passes because the file is listed in eslint-any-allowlist.json.

### WI-2: Extract the permissions section into sections/PermissionsSection.tsx (3/3 incomplete)
  - [ ] Given PermissionsSection.tsx, when typecheck + lint + the full vitest suite run, then all pass with 0 failures.
  - [ ] Given the refactor, when the diff is reviewed, then the permissions JSX is byte-for-byte the same except closed-over identifiers now come from props, and no export was renamed/removed.
  - [ ] Given PermissionsSection.tsx, when wc -l runs on it, then it is under 1000 lines.

### WI-3: Extract the cloister and remote sections into sections/CloisterSection.tsx and sections/RemoteSection.tsx (3/3 incomplete)
  - [ ] Given CloisterSection.tsx and RemoteSection.tsx, when typecheck + lint + the full vitest suite run, then all pass with 0 failures.
  - [ ] Given the refactor, when the rendered Settings page is inspected, then the cloister and remote sections appear in the same order/position with identical controls.
  - [ ] Given the moved remote JSX, when SettingsPage.test.ts runs, then its remote source-text assertions read from a new REMOTE_SECTION_SOURCE (sections/RemoteSection.tsx) and resolve, while the `{ id: 'remote' }` nav assertion still resolves against SettingsPage.tsx.

### WI-4: Extract the memory section into sections/MemorySection.tsx (3/3 incomplete)
  - [ ] Given MemorySection.tsx, when typecheck + lint + the full vitest suite run, then all pass with 0 failures.
  - [ ] Given MemorySection.tsx, when wc -l runs on it, then it is under 1000 lines.
  - [ ] Given the moved memory JSX, when SettingsPage.test.ts runs, then its memory source-text assertions read from a new MEMORY_SECTION_SOURCE (sections/MemorySection.tsx) and resolve, while the `{ id: 'memory' }` nav assertion still resolves against SettingsPage.tsx.

### WI-5: Extract background-ai, terminal, and tracker-keys sections (2/2 incomplete)
  - [ ] Given the three new section files, when typecheck + lint + the full vitest suite run, then all pass with 0 failures.
  - [ ] Given the new section files, when wc -l runs on each, then each is under 1000 lines.

### WI-6: Extract the appearance and diff sections into sections/AppearanceSection.tsx and sections/DiffSection.tsx (2/2 incomplete)
  - [ ] Given AppearanceSection.tsx and DiffSection.tsx, when typecheck + lint + the full vitest suite run, then all pass with 0 failures.
  - [ ] Given DiffSection.tsx, when wc -l runs on it, then it is under 1000 lines.

### WI-7: Extract the maintenance and experimental sections (both carry catch (err: any)) (3/3 incomplete)
  - [ ] Given MaintenanceSection.tsx and ExperimentalSection.tsx, when typecheck + lint + the full vitest suite run, then all pass with 0 failures and the any-ratchet passes (both files allowlisted).
  - [ ] Given the experimental section, when its data-testid attributes are diffed, then every testid (experimental-section, experimental-features-toggle, experimental-rtk-toggle, experimental-tldr-toggle, experimental-claude-code-channels-toggle, experimental-streamdown-toggle) is preserved unchanged.
  - [ ] Given the moved experimental JSX, when SettingsPage.test.ts runs, then its RTK and Streamdown source-text assertions read from a new EXPERIMENTAL_SECTION_SOURCE (sections/ExperimentalSection.tsx) and resolve.

### WI-8: Final verification — SettingsPage thin entry, all files under ceiling, gates green, pure-move diff (3/3 incomplete)
  - [ ] Given the completed refactor, when scripts/lint-file-size.sh runs, then it exits 0 (SettingsPage.tsx ≤ its 4200 baseline and materially smaller than 2043; no new file > 1000).
  - [ ] Given the completed refactor, when npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npx vitest run --configLoader runner run, then all pass with 0 failures.
  - [ ] Given the cumulative diff, when reviewed, then it is pure relocation: no logic edits, no renamed/removed exports, importers unchanged.

## NEEDS-YOU: Verification stuck

This was the final allowed verification attempt. The work agent is paused so it does not keep spending cycles on the same failing gate.

An operator needs to inspect PAN-2150, decide whether to fix-forward manually, restart the agent with new instructions, or move the issue through the normal pipeline. Do not re-request review automatically.
